description: A patient with lab-confirmed Vitamin D deficiency needs a supplement entry documented in their chart. Identify the patient using the information in /tmp/target_patient.txt. Log into NOSH ChartingSystem at http://localhost (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and add a supplement entry for Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol) 2000 IU capsule (Dosage: 2000 IU, Route: oral, Frequency: daily, Reason: Vitamin D deficiency) to the patient's record.
